name: Boston Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Dried peas (Great Northern or navy)
1/4 pound Salt pork or bacon, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer beans in 6 cups water for 30 minutes.
2. Allow to stand, covered, for 1 1/2 hours or until softened; drain.
3. Add all ingredients into a crockpot.
4. Add 1 cup water and stir to blend.
5. Cover pot and cook on LOW for 10 to 12 hours or on HIGH for 5 to 6 hours, stirring occasionally.
NOTE: A smoked ham shank or meaty ham bone may be cooked with the beans in place of salt pork.
